description: Pipeline plugin hooks: Stop → analytics relay (token usage from transcript) then stats relay (token + tool-failure enrichment for .claude/pipeline/.stats/); SubagentStop (matcher: pipeline-manager) → analytics relay (manager.stopped liveness signal when a pipeline-manager subagent ends — the matcher keeps the hook from spawning for every other subagent) then stats relay; SessionStart → pipeline-ui daemon launcher + project registration; PreToolUse → analytics relay (live mirror binding + run-level bypass START synthesis for pipeline-manager spawns); PostToolUse → analytics relay (tool counts + agent spawns + bypass END/fallback lifecycle synthesis); UserPromptSubmit → prompt match relay (BM25-matches the submitted prompt against the project's PIPELINE.md manifests and, on a confident single match only, injects one line of additionalContext suggesting the pipeline — gated by its own opt-in switch PIPELINE_PROMPT_MATCH_ENABLED, off by default). The whole UI/analytics system is ON BY DEFAULT — every UI hook runs at entry unless PIPELINE_UI_ENABLED is explicitly opted out with a falsy value 0/false/no/off (the master opt-OUT switch; the prompt match relay is a separate OPT-IN gated by PIPELINE_PROMPT_MATCH_ENABLED instead, off by default) — and is additionally a no-op when cwd has no .claude/pipeline/. EXCEPTION: Stop and SubagentStop additionally run the stats relay (token + tool-failure enrichment for the per-run measurement files under .claude/pipeline/.stats/, via the shared backfillProject core), which is ON BY DEFAULT and gated by its own PIPELINE_STATS_ENABLED (set 0 to disable); it too no-ops when the project has no .stats dir.
